resources.string: Don\'t have an account? Sign up
By signing up, you agree to our Terms & Conditions and Privacy Policy.
Already have an account? Sign in
so you can unlock quick next time!
Please enter your 4-digit PIN to unlock
Use your email/google account to sign in
Enter your registered email to receive a password reset email
Start your fantastic journey in our Safety App
Processing may take a minute or so. Thank you for your patience:)
You can add gentle reminders here to support your safety and well-being. If you’d like, you can also set alarms for each reminder in the Notification section to help you stay on track.
Alarms can help you stay on track when things feel overwhelming.

Welcome to Safety App.

 By using this app, you agree to the following terms:

 1. Not a Substitute for Emergency Services
 In case of danger or emergency, always call local authorities immediately (e.g. 911).

 2. No Guarantee of Safety
 Safety plans are personalized and situation-specific. They may not prevent harm.

 3. Use at Your Own Risk
 The developer disclaims all liability for any injury, loss, or damage arising from use of this app.

 4. Proper Use
 You agree not to misuse or interfere with the app’s operation, nor reverse-engineer it.

 5. Updates to Terms
 We may update these terms at any time. Continued use constitutes acceptance of changes.

 Last updated: August 2025

Safety App (“we”, “us”, “our”) is committed to protecting your privacy.

 What We Collect
 • Questionnaire responses (relationship status, answers to safety planning questions)
 • Emergency contacts, safe locations, medication details
 • Uploaded documents (only if you choose to upload: IDs, court orders, etc.)

 How We Store Data
 • All data is stored in Firebase Realtime Database under your user profile.
 • Your PIN is stored locally in encrypted SharedPreferences (AndroidX Security + Keystore).

 No Unsolicited Collection
 We do NOT collect your name, address, phone number, location, or other PII unless you explicitly upload it.

 No Third-Party Sharing
 We do not sell, trade, or share your personal data with third parties (Firebase only as our backend provider).

 Your Control
 You can view, edit, or delete all your data in the app’s settings at any time.

 Policy Updates
 We may update this policy. Last updated: August 2025.

 Questions? Contact us at support: safetyapp.contact@gmail.com
